name: cte_insert
description: CTE used with INSERT ... SELECT for bulk data insertion
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
CREATE TABLE archived_users (id INTEGER NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL)
query_sql:
-- @name ArchiveInactiveUsers
-- @returns :exec
WITH inactive AS (SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE status = 'inactive') INSERT INTO archived_users (id, name, email) SELECT id, name, email FROM inactive
